name: autonomous-os-kernel
description: Autonomous Agentic Operating System Kernel — a scalable, modular, observable, multi-agent, multi-service factory kernel.

scripts.build:deps: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter @factory/service-kit run build
scripts.dev: echo 'Run a specific service: pnpm --filter <service> run dev'
scripts.dev:all: pnpm sync:env && pnpm run build:deps && node scripts/dev-all.mjs
